subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of the Wronged One unto him who hath attained unto the Sealed Wine, when the Self-Subsisting appeared with manifest sovereignty. This is a Book that calleth aloud [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر المظلوم لمن فاز بالرحیق المختوم اذ اتی القیوم بسلطان مبین هذا کتاب ینادی
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation
